construction.name: Construction
construction.description: Safety checklists for construction sites, covering fall protection, scaffolding, excavation, and heavy equipment operations

jha.name: Job Hazard Analysis (JHA)
jha.description: Systematic process to identify workplace hazards before each task, assess risk severity, and establish control measures for worker protection

items.task_description: Describe the task to be performed
items.step_sequence: List the steps in the correct sequence
items.risk_severity: Rate the severity of identified risks (1-5)
items.control_measures: Describe control measures for each hazard
items.ppe_required: All required PPE has been identified and is available
items.responsible_person: Name of the responsible person for this task
items.workers_briefed: All workers have been briefed on the hazards and controls

fall_protection.name: Fall Protection Audit
fall_protection.description: Comprehensive inspection of fall protection systems including guardrails, harnesses, anchor points, and safety nets to ensure compliance with height safety regulations

items.guardrail_integrity: Guardrails are intact and properly secured
items.harness_webbing: Harness webbing is free of cuts, fraying, or damage
items.harness_d_ring: D-ring is not bent, cracked, or corroded
items.harness_stitching: All stitching is intact with no pulled threads
items.anchor_point_rating: Anchor point is rated for the required load capacity
items.safety_net_condition: Safety nets are properly positioned and in good condition
items.hole_covers_secured: All floor/roof hole covers are secured and labeled
items.ladder_tie_off: Ladders are properly tied off or secured at the top

scaffold.name: Scaffold Inspection
scaffold.description: Detailed inspection of scaffold structures for structural integrity, proper assembly, and compliance with safety standards before each use

items.base_plate_mudsill: Base plates and mudsills are in good condition
items.cross_bracing: Cross-bracing is secure and properly installed
items.planking_complete: Planking is complete with no gaps greater than 1 inch
items.toe_boards: Toe boards are in place on all open sides
items.weather_damage: No visible weather damage to scaffold components

toolbox_talk.name: Toolbox Talk Record
toolbox_talk.description: Documentation of daily safety briefings conducted on-site, including the topic covered, attendees, and any follow-up actions identified

items.topic_covered: Topic discussed during the toolbox talk
items.attendees_signed: All attendees have signed the attendance sheet
items.questions_raised: Questions or concerns raised during the talk

excavation.name: Excavation/Trenching Inspection
excavation.description: Safety inspection for excavation and trenching work, verifying soil classification, protective systems, and safe access before workers enter the trench

items.shoring_adequate: Shoring or sloping is adequate for the depth
items.spoil_pile_distance: Spoil pile is at least 2 feet from the trench edge
items.water_accumulation: No hazardous water accumulation in the trench
items.egress_points: Egress points are available every 25 feet
items.utilities_marked: All underground utilities have been located and marked

crane.name: Crane/Hoist Pre-Operation
crane.description: Pre-operation safety check for cranes and hoisting equipment, verifying mechanical condition, operator qualifications, and lift plan readiness

items.wire_rope_condition: Wire rope is free of kinks, bird-caging, and broken strands
items.outriggers_deployed: Outriggers are fully extended and on solid ground
items.load_chart_available: Load chart is available and legible in the cab
items.swing_radius: Swing radius is barricaded and clear of personnel
items.operator_certification: Operator certification is current and valid

manufacturing.name: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Safety checklists for manufacturing facilities, covering lockout/tagout, machine guarding, ergonomics, and production floor safety

loto.name: Lockout/Tagout Verification
loto.description: Verification checklist for lockout/tagout procedures to confirm hazardous energy sources are properly isolated before servicing or maintenance work

items.machine_identified: Machine or equipment has been properly identified
items.energy_sources_listed: All energy sources have been identified and listed
items.isolation_devices: Isolation devices have been applied to all energy sources
items.stored_energy_released: All stored or residual energy has been released
items.verification_attempted: Verification of isolation has been attempted
items.authorized_employee: Authorized employee has signed off on the lockout
items.tags_attached: Lockout/tagout tags are properly attached and legible

machine_guarding.name: Machine Guarding Inspection
machine_guarding.description: Inspection of machine guarding systems to verify guards are in place, interlocks are functioning, and emergency stops are accessible and tested

items.point_of_operation: Point-of-operation guards are in place and secure
items.emergency_stop: Emergency stop button is accessible and tested
items.light_curtain: Light curtain alignment is correct (if applicable)
items.guard_mounting: Guard mounting hardware is tight and secure
items.no_bypass: No bypass devices are present on safety systems
items.warning_labels: Warning labels are visible and legible

ergonomic.name: Ergonomic Assessment
ergonomic.description: Workstation ergonomic evaluation to identify repetitive motion risks, awkward postures, and force requirements, with recommendations for improvement

items.repetitive_motion: Repetitive motion frequency has been assessed
items.force_requirements: Force requirements are within acceptable limits
items.awkward_postures: Awkward postures have been identified and documented
items.workstation_height: Workstation height is appropriate for the worker
items.rest_breaks: Adequate rest break schedule is in place

forklift.name: Forklift Daily Pre-Use
forklift.description: Daily pre-use inspection for forklifts and powered industrial trucks, verifying mechanical systems, safety devices, and operator readiness

items.tires_wheels: Tires and wheels are in good condition
items.forks_condition: Forks are free of cracks, bends, or excessive wear
items.hydraulic_lines: Hydraulic lines show no leaks or damage
items.lights_working: All lights are functioning (headlights, tail, strobe)
items.brakes_tested: Brakes have been tested and are responsive
items.battery_fuel: Battery charge or fuel level is adequate
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is mounted and charged

chemical_spill.name: Chemical Spill Response Readiness
chemical_spill.description: Readiness assessment for chemical spill response, verifying spill kit contents, emergency equipment, PPE availability, and evacuation route accessibility

items.spill_kit_location: Spill kit location is known and accessible
items.spill_kit_contents: Spill kit contents are complete and not expired
items.sds_binder: SDS binder is current and accessible
items.eyewash_tested: Eyewash station has been tested (weekly flush)
items.ppe_available: Required PPE for spill response is available
items.evacuation_route: Evacuation route is clear and marked

safety_walk.name: Production Floor Safety Walk
safety_walk.description: General safety walkthrough of the production floor to assess housekeeping, PPE compliance, emergency equipment readiness, and overall safety conditions

items.aisles_clear: Aisles and walkways are clear and unobstructed
items.ppe_compliance: All workers are wearing required PPE
items.housekeeping: Housekeeping is acceptable throughout the area
items.emergency_exits: Emergency exits are unobstructed and marked
items.fire_extinguishers: Fire extinguishers are accessible and inspected
items.noise_levels: Noise levels are within acceptable limits
items.first_aid_kit: First aid kit is stocked and accessible

oil_gas.name: Oil & Gas
oil_gas.description: Safety checklists for oil and gas operations, covering permit-to-work, confined space entry, H2S safety, and well site inspections

ptw.name: Permit-to-Work
ptw.description: Formal authorization process for high-risk work activities, ensuring hazards are identified, controls are in place, and all parties have reviewed the work scope

items.work_description: Work to be performed has been clearly described
items.hazards_identified: All hazards have been identified and documented
items.gas_test_results: Gas test results are within safe limits
items.isolation_verified: Isolation of energy sources has been verified
items.ppe_specified: Required PPE has been specified and is available
items.time_validity: Permit validity period has been set and communicated

confined_space.name: Confined Space Entry
confined_space.description: Entry permit checklist for confined space work, including atmospheric monitoring, ventilation setup, rescue planning, and continuous monitoring requirements

items.atmospheric_lel: LEL reading is below 10% of the lower explosive limit
items.atmospheric_h2s: H2S level is below the action level
items.atmospheric_co: CO level is below the permissible exposure limit
items.ventilation_setup: Ventilation equipment is set up and functioning
items.rescue_plan: Rescue plan has been reviewed and is in place
items.communication_method: Communication method has been established and tested
items.entry_permit_signed: Entry permit has been completed and signed

h2s.name: H2S Safety Check
h2s.description: Pre-work safety verification for areas with potential hydrogen sulfide exposure, covering personal monitors, breathing apparatus, and buddy system protocols

items.personal_monitor: Personal H2S monitor is calibrated and functioning
items.wind_sock: Wind sock or direction indicator is visible
items.muster_points: Muster points have been identified and communicated
items.scba_staged: SCBA equipment is staged and ready for use
items.buddy_system: Buddy system is confirmed and in effect
items.h2s_training: H2S training is current for all personnel on site
items.alarm_threshold: Alarm threshold is set at 10 ppm

hot_work.name: Hot Work Permit
hot_work.description: Safety checklist for hot work activities such as welding, cutting, or grinding in areas where fire or explosion hazards may exist

items.fire_watch: Fire watch has been assigned and is in position
items.radius_cleared: Area within 35 feet has been cleared of combustibles
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is staged within reach
items.post_work_watch: Post-work 30-minute fire watch has been scheduled
items.hot_work_area: Hot work area has been properly designated

well_site.name: Well Site Inspection
well_site.description: Routine inspection of well site operations and equipment, covering blowout preventer function, flowline integrity, containment, and emergency readiness

items.flowline_integrity: Flowlines are intact with no visible leaks
items.tank_levels: Tank levels are within acceptable range
items.signage_visible: Required signage is visible and legible
items.emergency_equipment: Emergency equipment is accessible and functional

contractor.name: Contractor Orientation
contractor.description: Safety orientation checklist for contractors entering the site, verifying induction completion, hazard awareness, PPE, and required documentation

items.ppe_verified: PPE has been provided and verified

healthcare.name: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Safety checklists for healthcare facilities, covering infection control, sharps disposal, patient safety, and emergency equipment readiness

infection_control.name: Infection Control Round
infection_control.description: Routine infection prevention round to verify hand hygiene availability, PPE supply, isolation protocols, and surface disinfection compliance

items.hand_hygiene_stations: Hand hygiene stations are stocked with soap and sanitizer
items.ppe_supply: PPE supply is adequate for the unit
items.isolation_signage: Isolation signage is correct and in place
items.sharps_containers: Sharps containers are not overfull (below 3/4 line)
items.surface_disinfection: Surface disinfection schedule is being followed
items.patient_placement: Patient placement is appropriate for infection status

sharps.name: Sharps Disposal Audit
sharps.description: Audit of sharps disposal practices and container management to ensure safe handling and regulatory compliance across clinical areas

items.container_fill_level: Container fill level is below the 3/4 line
items.no_protruding_items: No items are protruding from the container
items.label_visible: Container label is visible and legible
items.needle_free_systems: Needle-free systems are in use where applicable

patient_safety.name: Patient Safety Round
patient_safety.description: Bedside safety round to verify patient identification, fall risk assessment, medication verification, and care plan currency

items.bed_rails: Bed rails are appropriate for patient needs
items.call_bell: Call bell is within patient reach
items.fall_risk: Fall risk has been assessed and documented
items.id_band: Patient identification band is present and correct
items.care_plan: Care plan is current and updated

emergency_equip.name: Emergency Equipment Check
emergency_equip.description: Inspection of clinical emergency equipment including crash carts, defibrillators, suction devices, and emergency medications for readiness

items.crash_cart_sealed: Crash cart is sealed with tamper indicator intact
items.defibrillator: Defibrillator is charged and self-test passed
items.resuscitation_bag: Resuscitation bag and mask are intact

hand_hygiene.name: Hand Hygiene Observation
hand_hygiene.description: Direct observation audit of hand hygiene compliance based on the WHO five moments, documenting technique and compliance rates

items.before_patient: Hand hygiene performed before patient contact
items.after_patient: Hand hygiene performed after patient contact
items.after_surroundings: Hand hygiene performed after touching patient surroundings
items.before_clean_procedure: Hand hygiene performed before clean or aseptic procedure
items.after_body_fluid: Hand hygiene performed after body fluid exposure

fire_life.name: Fire/Life Safety Walk
fire_life.description: Facility walkthrough to verify fire and life safety compliance, including exit signage, fire doors, corridor clearance, and detector functionality

items.exit_signs: Exit signs are illuminated and visible
items.corridors_clear: Corridors are clear of equipment and obstructions
items.extinguishers: Fire extinguishers are inspected and accessible
items.smoke_detectors: Smoke detectors are tested and functional
items.evacuation_plan: Evacuation plan is posted and current

warehousing.name: Warehousing
warehousing.description: Safety checklists for warehouse operations, covering forklift inspections, dock safety, fire protection, and pedestrian zone management

forklift.name: Forklift Daily Pre-Use
forklift.description: Daily pre-use inspection for warehouse forklifts, covering mechanical condition, safety features, and operator certification verification

items.tires_wheels: Tires and wheels are in good condition
items.forks_condition: Forks are free of cracks, bends, or excessive wear
items.hydraulic_lines: Hydraulic lines show no leaks or damage
items.brakes_tested: Brakes have been tested and are responsive
items.battery_fuel: Battery charge or fuel level is adequate
items.fire_extinguisher: Fire extinguisher is mounted and charged
items.operator_cert: Operator certification is on file and current

dock.name: Dock Safety Check
dock.description: Pre-loading safety check for dock operations, verifying dock plates, wheel chocks, trailer securement, and lighting conditions

items.dock_plate: Dock plate or board is in good condition
items.wheel_chocks: Wheel chocks are in place and secure
items.gap_check: No hazardous gap between trailer and dock

fire_extinguisher.name: Fire Extinguisher Monthly
fire_extinguisher.description: Monthly visual inspection of fire extinguishers to verify accessibility, charge status, physical condition, and inspection tag currency

items.accessible: Fire extinguisher is not blocked and is accessible
items.charge_gauge: Charge gauge is in the green zone
items.no_damage: No visible damage to the extinguisher body
items.inspection_tag: Inspection tag is current and signed
items.correct_type: Extinguisher type is correct for the area hazards

rack.name: Rack Integrity Audit
rack.description: Structural integrity audit of warehouse racking systems, checking for damage, proper anchoring, load capacity compliance, and connector security

items.upright_damage: Uprights are free of dents, bowing, or twisting
items.beam_connectors: Beam connector locks are in place
items.load_capacity: Load capacity labels are posted and visible
items.overloading: No evidence of overloading beyond rated capacity
items.wire_decking: Wire decking is in good condition (if applicable)

pedestrian.name: Pedestrian Safety Zone Check
pedestrian.description: Inspection of pedestrian safety zones within the warehouse, verifying floor markings, barriers, mirrors, and separation between foot and vehicle traffic

items.floor_markings: Floor markings are visible and not worn
items.barriers_intact: Barriers are intact and properly positioned
items.blind_corner_mirrors: Mirrors are in place at blind corners
items.speed_limit_signs: Speed limit signs are posted and visible
items.separate_paths: Separate travel paths exist for pedestrians and vehicles

receiving.name: Receiving Dock Safety Walk
receiving.description: Safety walk of the receiving dock area to assess spill cleanup, slip hazards, lighting, PPE compliance, and safe handling practices

items.spills_cleaned: All spills have been cleaned up
items.slip_hazards: No slip or trip hazards identified
items.lighting_working: All lighting in the receiving area is working
